---
jupyter:
  jupytext:
    text_representation:
      extension: .Rmd
      format_name: rmarkdown
      format_version: '1.2'
      jupytext_version: 1.19.1
  kernelspec:
    display_name: Python 3 (ipykernel)
    language: python
    name: python3
---

```{python}
import numpy as np
```

```{python}
def prepare_J(file):
    J_t = np.load(file)
    J = np.empty_like(J_t)
    J[0]=np.roll(J_t[1],shift=-1,axis=-2)
    J[1]=np.roll(J_t[0],shift=-1,axis=-1)
    return J
    
```

```{python}
J = prepare_J('numpy/J_64x64.npy')
```

```{python}
np.savetxt('J_64x64_a.txt', J.ravel(),'%d')
```

```{python}
J = prepare_J('numpy/J_16x16.npy')
```

```{python}
np.savetxt('J_16x16_a.txt', J.ravel())
```

```{python}

```
